description: Create a business process flowchart in LibreOffice Writer based on the steps provided in /home/ga/Documents/workflow_source.txt. Use standard flowchart symbols: ovals for start/end, rectangles for process steps, and a diamond for the decision. Connect the shapes using dynamic connectors that remain attached when shapes are moved. Include the text labels specified in the source file and label decision branches with 'Yes' and 'No'. Group all shapes and connectors into a single object and save the document as /home/ga/Documents/procurement_flow.odt.
